headline: Tesla Makes Full Self Driving More Accessible To Some Customers By Lowering Price
summary: Tesla Inc's (NASDAQ: TSLA) Full Self Driving (FSD) Beta continues to impress, with many fans and Tesla owners posting videos of their FSD Beta experiences on social media.

headline: Tony Zhang's Broadcom Options Trade, Ahead Of Earnings
summary: Tony Zhang suggested on CNBC's "Options Action" traders should consider a bullish options trade in Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO), going into earnings.

headline: Cramer Gives His Opinion On Boeing, Fiverr And More
summary: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round" on Friday, Jim Cramer said Boeing Co (NYSE: BA) is still a buy, even though the Dreamliner numbers weren't that good and the stock went down.

headline: Steve Wozniak's Blockchain Venture Lists Cryptocurrency Token, Reaches $950M In 13 Minutes
summary: Steve Wozniak’s blockchain venture Efforce has listed its cryptocurrency token on the HBTC exchange.

headline: Gilead's Kite Announced Yescarta Shows Positive Results as a First-Line Treatment for Patients With High-Risk Large B-cell Lymphoma in Presentation at ASH 2020
Apple Will Fix Some iPhone 11 Devices For Free
summary: Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) has released a statement offering free repairs for some iPhone 11 models.

headline: Buyers Of Tesla Shorts Still Waiting For Delivery After 5 Months: Financial Times
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has not yet delivered branded shorts to customers who ordered them in summer, leaving some frustrated, the Financial Times reported.

headline: Gildead Announced Magrolimab Demonstrated Clinical Responses in Ongoing Phase 1b Trial of Previously Untreated Acute Myeloid Leukemia Patients, at ASH 2020
Google Accuses Ask.com Owner IAC Of Browser Hijacking: Wall Street Journal
summary:
IAC Chairman Barry Diller

A fight is developing between Google and IAC/Interactivecorp. (NASDAQ: IAC), The Wall Street Journal reported today.

headline: IPO Outlook For The Week: Airbnb, DoorDash Lead Highly Anticipated Week
summary: The highly anticipated debuts of Airbnb and DoorDash are among the seven IPOs markets could see this coming week.

headline: Week Ahead In Biotech: FDA To Decide On Emergency Use Of Pfizer's COVID Vaccine, Hematology Conference Presentations Pick Up Pace
summary: Biotech stocks headed higher in the week ended Dec. 5 as broader market optimism pervaded into the sector. The sector also continued to get support from vaccine-related positive news flow.
